advancements.vampires.01_first_blood.des: Prey on your first victim... With enough bloodshed, you can lure out stronger opponents.
advancements.vampires.10_notoriety.title: Notoriety
advancements.vampires.10_notoriety.descr: After 10 kills, you've caught the attention of the wider human society. Watch out, new foes will soon appear...
advancements.vampires.20_assassin.title: Assassin
advancements.vampires.20_assassin.descri: After 20 kills, they're sending out some real heavy-hitters. Watch out for Illusioners... They might know the way to the Frosted Prison.
advancements.vampires.30_rampager.title: Rampager
advancements.vampires.30_rampager.descri: After 30 kills, reinforcement drills and summoner spellcasters are being sent after you... Keep taking them out.
advancements.vampires.40_monster.title: Monster
advancements.vampires.40_monster.descrip: After 40 kills, Legioner knights and the infernal Pyreillagers are on your tail. Slaying one of the latter might lead you to a Dragon Tower.
advancements.vampires.50_destroyer.title: Destroyer
advancements.vampires.50_destroyer.descr: After 50 kills, the strongest defense forces of the Illager Empire have been deployed. Take out an Electrocutioner to find the Acropolis.
